title: relationshipTypeSeedMetaschema
description: The flat, hand-authored column description for the `relationship-type` type's own projection table obj_<relationship-type>. relationship-type EXTENDS the (nested, non-flat) type payload — it is `allOf: [type.json, { meta: { directional, inverse } }]` — so its columns cannot be derived from its own jsonSchema any more than `type`'s can (the same circularity typeSeedMetaschema breaks for obj_<type-type>). This seed = the typeSeedMetaschema columns PLUS metaDirectional and metaInverse, so obj_<relationship-type> carries every type-registry column a relationship-type item needs (its jsonSchema validates relationship.data) plus the two directional-semantics columns. Held as an export-only constant from @kanecta/specification (NOT a second rootPayload.seedMetaschema field — it is derivative of the already-stored type seed, not a second irreducible bootstrap); the adapter special-cases _ensureProjection(relationship-type-uuid) to compile obj_<relationship-type> from it (spec §cqrs-projections). Properties are named so the compiler's camelCase->snake_case mapping yields the obj_<relationship-type> columns.

metaPrimaryField.description: -> meta_primary_field. Field/expression computing item.value for instances.

metaAiInstructionsClaude.description: -> meta_ai_instructions_claude. Guidance for Claude on using this type.

metaDirectional.description: -> meta_directional. Whether the relationship has direction (source -> target). false means symmetric/self-inverse.

metaInverse.description: -> meta_inverse. UUID of the paired inverse relationship-type item (e.g. depends-on <-> enables). null for self-inverse types like relates-to.

jsonSchema.description: -> json_schema JSONB. The Draft-07 schema validating relationship.data for instances of this relationship type. A stored JSON document round-tripped as a unit.

sqlSchema.description: -> sql_schema TEXT[]. Authored DDL statements (typically empty — relationships project to the single obj_<relationship>, not per-relationship-type tables).

sync.description: -> sync UUID[]. Function items that refresh instances from source.

supersededBy.description: -> superseded_by UUID[]. Definitions replacing this one.

implements.description: -> implements UUID[]. Types whose contract this fulfils.

indexes.description: -> indexes JSONB. Authored secondary-index declarations for this type's obj_ table.
